texto: It is eternity now. I am in the midst of it. It is about me in the sunshine
autor: I am in it as the butterfly in the light-laden air. Nothing has to come
explicacao: Citação de I am in it as the butterfly in the light-laden air. Nothing has to come sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is eternity now. I am in the midst of it.
